headline: Citizens Initiates Coverage of Live Nation at Outperform With $190 Target
summary: Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) has delivered a 13.48% gain over the past year. Recent momentum has pulled back, though, with the stock down 2.22% over the past week and off 8.42% over the past month, sitting at $148.18 and well below its 52-week high of $175.25.
